title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1509
text:
454.1509.  Remedies cumulative. — (a)  Remedies provided by sections 454.1500 to 454.1728 are cumulative and do not affect the availability of remedies under other law or the recognition of a foreign support order on the basis of comity.
  (b)  Sections 454.1500 to 454.1728 do not:
  (1)  provide the exclusive method of establishing or enforcing a support order under the law of this state; or
  (2)  grant a tribunal of this state jurisdiction to render judgment or issue an order relating to child custody or visitation in a proceeding under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
